sql:
SELECT
	id,
	first_name,
	last_name,
	middle_name,
	CONCAT_WS(' ',first_name, middle_name, last_name) AS full_name,
	sex,
	birthday,
	classification,
	office,
	college,
	uhs_id_no,
	emed_no,
	ihomis_no,
	philhealth_no,
	created_at,
	updated_at
FROM
	patients
ORDER BY created_at DESC
name: patients
